name: Model Angelo
description: Automatic atomic model building program for protein and nucleic acid structures from cryo-EM maps given a mrc file. Optionally, include a known protein sequence to inform the model building.
capabilities: Automatic atomic model building program for protein and nucleic acid structures from cryo-EM maps given a mrc file
Optionally, include a known protein sequence to inform the model building

mrcFile.description: Cryo-EM density map file in MRC format for automatic atomic model building

sequence.description: Optional protein sequence in FASTA format to inform the model building process
